creator: demelier.david@gmail.com
text:
On 27/01/2011 20:50, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/154342'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=154342
>
>> Category:       ports
>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>> Synopsis:       [patch] x11/dmenu: Update do 4.2.1 and XFT removed
>> Arrival-Date:   Thu Jan 27 19:50:06 UTC 2011

By the way, if you want you can also remove this conditional statement :

.if defined(DMENU_CONF)
         @${ECHO_MSG} "creating config.h from ${DMENU_CONF}"
         @${CP} ${DMENU_CONF} ${WRKSRC}/config.h
.endif

It seems dmenu developers removed the config.h ..

-- 
David Demelier
